criteria.budgetStrategy: Driving trip, off-site or value lodging, limited park days, and careful ticket selection. Disney resort packages are unlikely under this budget for six people unless there is an unusually strong promotion.
preferredResortTypes: Value resort if major promotion appears
mustHave: Works for a three-year-old, six-year-old, teenagers, and two adults
Total estimate close to 2000 to 3000 dollars
niceToHave: One character meal option if the budget survives

agent.summary:
```json
{
  "summary": "The Bell family is planning a Walt Disney World trip for 6 people driving from Texarkana/Genoa targeting a $2,000–$3,000 budget. The most realistic and budget-friendly option is driving with off-site value lodging and 1 park day, estimated at $2,850. Other options with 2 park days or Disney value resort stays exceed the budget unless strong promotions appear. Recent checks of official Disney offers and ticket sites reveal no current strong price signals or discounts. Monitoring hotel room rates under $150/night and ticket promotions is advised to stay within budget.",
  "bestMove": {
    "dealId": "drive-offsite-one-park-day",
    "title": "Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day",
    "estimatedTotal": 2850,
    "summary": "Most realistic path to Disney inside the $2,000–$3,000 target. It keeps the magic, but limits park tickets.",
    "action": "Watch for hotel rooms under $150/night and ticket promos. Book only when the real total stays under $3,000.",
    "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
  },
  "watchItems": [
    {
      "dealId": "drive-good-neighbor-two-days",
      "title": "Drive + Good Neighbor hotel + 2 park days",
      "estimatedTotal": 3750,
      "summary": "Better Disney feel, but likely above budget unless a hotel or ticket discount appears.",
      "action": "Use as stretch target. Alert only if total drops near $3,000.",
      "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
    },
    {
      "dealId": "drive-disney-value-promo",
      "title": "Drive + Disney value resort promotion",
      "estimatedTotal": 4300,
      "summary": "Best experience, weakest budget fit. Only interesting if Disney posts a major public offer.",
      "action": "Watch official Disney special offers. Do not book unless the full math changes.",
      "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
    },
    {
      "sourceId": "wdw-special-offers",
      "title": "Walt Disney World Special Offers",
      "summary": "Checked Walt Disney World Special Offers. No current price signals or discounts matching criteria.",
      "action": "Open this source and verify whether any promotions apply to your dates and family size.",
      "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/special-offers/"
    },
    {
      "sourceId": "wdw-tickets",
      "title": "Walt Disney World Tickets",
      "summary": "Checked ticket prices with no relevant discounts found yet.",
      "action": "Review ticket prices periodically to catch any new promotions before booking.",
      "sourceUrl": "https://disneyworld.disney.go.com/admission/tickets/"
    }
  ],
  "recommendations": [
    "Prioritize booking the 'Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day' deal once prices confirm under $3,000 total.",
    "Monitor hotel deals for rooms under $150 per night and any ticket promotions to stay within budget.",
    "Consider the 'Good Neighbor hotel + 2 park days' as a stretch goal if discounts drop the price near $3,000.",
    "Regularly check official Disney special offers and tickets for new deals or promotions.",
    "Avoid Disney value resort packages unless a strong public promotion emerges lowering total costs.",
    "Keep travel schedule driving-friendly and family-oriented, with lower crowd dates and potentially a pool day.",
    "If budget permits, consider adding one character meal option if it remains affordable after core bookings."
  ],
  "textAlertDraft": "Disney Alert: The 'Drive + off-site hotel + 1 Disney park day' trip estimate is $2,850. Verify hotel and ticket prices today and book only if total stays under $3,000."
}
```
